home.summary: Overview of your projects and usage in KOSMO.

workspace.specsDesc: The AI will analyze your Discovery document to identify and propose the functional modules (specs) of your project. Each module will go through the Requirements, Design, Tasks, and Code phases.
workspace.specsFooter: You can manually edit or add specs after generation.
workspace.modulesIdentified: {{count}} module(s) identified. Click on a module to view its development phases.
workspace.emptyDocumentDesc: This document has not been generated yet. Use the "Generate" button below for the AI to propose the initial content.
workspace.creator: Creator
workspace.errorRetry: An error occurred. Please try again.
workspace.canCancel: You can cancel at any time.
workspace.errorInsufficientBalance: You don't have enough balance on the API Key for this model.
workspace.errorRateLimit: You have exceeded the rate limit for your provider.
workspace.errorInvalidKey: The provided API Key is invalid or lacks permissions.
workspace.errorNetwork: There was a network error while connecting to the provider.
workspace.errorGeneric: An unexpected error occurred during generation.

status.emptyDiagramDesc: This diagram has not been generated yet. Use the "Generate" button below so the AI can propose the initial architecture.

newProject.title: New project
newProject.subtitle: Define the project idea. You can configure agents and generate Discovery later.
newProject.limitReached: You have reached the limit of {{max}} projects
newProject.limitDesc: For now KOSMO allows up to {{max}} projects per workspace. Archive or delete an existing one to create a new one.
newProject.projectIdeaPlaceholder: Describe in a few lines the problem it solves and for whom…

about.label: About
about.desc: Spec-Driven Development and Vibe Modeling platform that orchestrates AI agents to take your ideas from discovery to code.
about.universityDesc: Project developed within the Faculty of Systems Engineering as an applied exploration of SDD methodologies, Vibe Modeling and generative AI agents.
about.licenseDesc: KOSMO is released under the MIT License. You are free to use, copy, modify, merge, publish, distribute, and sublicense the code, provided the copyright notice is retained.

globalSettings.title: Workspace Settings
globalSettings.subtitle: Manage settings across your entire KOSMO workspace.
globalSettings.deleteWorkspaceDesc: This action is permanent. All projects, specs, and history will be removed.
globalSettings.spendByRoleHint: Details per agent in each project
globalSettings.summaryHint: Summary view. For tokens, model and cost per agent, open Project Settings → Monitoring.
globalSettings.workspaceIdentityDesc: Name and slug are used in URLs and reports.
globalSettings.localizationDesc: Applied as base to all projects.
globalSettings.agentNotConfigured: You don't have an agent configured for this stage. Please select one.

projectSettings.agentConfigDesc: Configure specific LLM models for this project.
projectSettings.globalFallback: If no local model is configured, the global configuration will be used.
projectSettings.clearSuccess: Local overrides cleared. Global models will be used.

apiErrors.string_too_short: The password must be at least {{min_length}} characters long.
